languages.text: В могильной тишине отряд добрался до ближайшей развилки галереи, и в ту же секунду ауспексы разразились предупреждающими сигналами. Прогноз устройств был точен и неумолим — в правом ответвлении отряд мог погибнуть из-за неизвестных гравитационных аномалий, а из левого к нам неотвратимо приближались войска противника.

traits.locale_text:
Звук повторился, затем еще. Тихий шелест вскоре превратился в низкий вибрирующий гул, звучащий на грани восприятия, возрастающий и спадающий подобно дыханию чего-то неописуемо древнего, и столь же неописуемо ужасного. Он заставлял кожу зудеть, а внутренности скручиваться в пронизанный страхом узел. У потомка хватило сил отринуть это наваждение, и лишь благодаря {mf|его|ее} стойкости, сердца всех, кто следовал за нами, выдержали это испытание.
Галерея перед нами вдруг расступилась, распалась на две ветви, ведущие в разные стороны, и в ту же секунду ауспексы разразились предупреждающими сигналами.

languages.text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.
languages.original_text: В могильной тишине отряд добрался до ближайшей развилки галереи, и в ту же секунду ауспексы разразились предупреждающими сигналами. Прогноз устройств был точен и неумолим — в правом ответвлении отряд мог погибнуть из-за неизвестных гравитационных аномалий, а из левого к нам неотвратимо приближались войска противника.

traits.locale_text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, its sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while enemy forces were inexorably approaching us from the left-hand one.

The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

In the sepulchral silence, the squad reached the closest fork in the passageway, and at the same second, the auspexes erupted with warning signals.
In the right branch of the fork, scarlet flashing lights alerted us to the presence of gravitational anomalies. While from the left branch, a torrent of lesser Necron spawn was hurtling toward us!

The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, its sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while enemy forces were inexorably approaching us from the left-hand one.

The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

languages.text: 小队刚抵达最近的通道岔口，鸟卜仪的警报就撕裂了墓穴般的死寂。设备的判断冷酷而精准：右侧通道存在未知重力异常，足以让整支小队丧命；而在左侧通道，敌军正在无情地逼近。
languages.original_text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

traits.locale_text: 小队刚抵达最近的通道岔口，鸟卜仪的警报就撕裂了墓穴般的死寂。设备的判断冷酷而精准：右侧通道存在未知重力异常，足以让整支小队丧命；而在左侧通道，敌军正在无情地逼近。

languages.text: En cuanto el grupo llegó a la bifurcación más cercana, el silencio sepulcral dio paso a señales de advertencia desde los auspexes. La evaluación de los dispositivos era tan precisa como despiadada: el camino a la derecha contenía anomalías gravitatorias que podrían matar a la escuadra, mientras que por el de la izquierda se acercaban fuerzas enemigas.
languages.original_text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

traits.locale_text: En cuanto el grupo llegó a la bifurcación más cercana, el silencio sepulcral dio paso a señales de advertencia desde los auspexes. La evaluación de los dispositivos era tan precisa como despiadada: el camino a la derecha contenía anomalías gravitatorias que podrían matar a la escuadra, mientras que por el de la izquierda se acercaban fuerzas enemigas.

languages.text: À l'instant même où l'escouade atteignit un premier croisement dans le passage, le silence lugubre fut rompu par les signaux d'avertissement des auspex. Leurs analyses aussi précises qu'impitoyables nous informaient de deux dangers : la branche de droite recelait des anomalies gravitationnelles inconnues susceptibles de tuer l'escouade, tandis que, dans celle de gauche, des forces ennemies se rapprochaient inexorablement.
languages.original_text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

traits.locale_text: À l'instant même où l'escouade atteignit un premier croisement dans le passage, le silence lugubre fut rompu par les signaux d'avertissement des auspex. Leurs analyses aussi précises qu'impitoyables nous informaient de deux dangers : la branche de droite recelait des anomalies gravitationnelles inconnues susceptibles de tuer l'escouade, tandis que, dans celle de gauche, des forces ennemies se rapprochaient inexorablement.

languages.text: Manga geçitteki en yakın çatala ulaştığı anda uzgörenlerden yükselen uyarı sinyalleri sessizliğini bozdu. Cihazların değerlendirmeleri ne kadar kesinse o kadar da acımasızdı: Sağdaki yol, mangayı öldürebilecek bilinmeyen yerçekimsel anomalileri barındırırken soldaki yoldan düşman kuvvetleri amansızca yaklaşıyordu.
languages.original_text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

traits.locale_text: Manga geçitteki en yakın çatala ulaştığı anda uzgörenlerden yükselen uyarı sinyalleri sessizliğini bozdu. Cihazların değerlendirmeleri ne kadar kesinse o kadar da acımasızdı: Sağdaki yol, mangayı öldürebilecek bilinmeyen yerçekimsel anomalileri barındırırken soldaki yoldan düşman kuvvetleri amansızca yaklaşıyordu.

languages.text: Als der Trupp die nächstgelegene Abzweigung erreichte, wurde die Grabesstille mit einem Mal von den warnenden Signalen der Auspizien durchbrochen. Die Einschätzungen der Geräte waren ebenso präzise wie schonungslos: Während auf der rechten Seite unbekannte gravitatorische Anomalien lauerten, die den Tod des Trupps bedeuten konnten, näherten sich auf der linken Seite unaufhaltsam feindliche Kräfte.
languages.original_text: The second the squad reached the nearest fork in the passageway, the sepulchral silence was broken by warning signals erupting from the auspexes. The devices' assessments were as precise as they were pitiless: the right-hand branch held unknown gravitational anomalies that might kill the squad, while from the left-hand one enemy forces were inexorably approaching.

traits.locale_text: Als der Trupp die nächstgelegene Abzweigung erreichte, wurde die Grabesstille mit einem Mal von den warnenden Signalen der Auspizien durchbrochen. Die Einschätzungen der Geräte waren ebenso präzise wie schonungslos: Während auf der rechten Seite unbekannte gravitatorische Anomalien lauerten, die den Tod des Trupps bedeuten konnten, näherten sich auf der linken Seite unaufhaltsam feindliche Kräfte.

languages.text:
墓のような静寂の中、部隊は通路の最も近い分岐点に達した。そして同時に、監視塔から警報が鳴り響いた。
右側の分岐では、赤い閃光が重力異常の兆候を告げていた。一方、左側の分岐からは、ネクロンの小兵が大量に襲いかかってきた！
languages.original_text:
In the sepulchral silence, the squad reached the closest fork in the passageway, and at the same second, the auspexes erupted with warning signals.
In the right branch of the fork, scarlet flashing lights alerted us to the presence of gravitational anomalies. While from the left branch, a torrent of lesser Necron spawn was hurtling toward us!

traits.locale_text:
墓のような静寂の中、部隊は通路の最も近い分岐点に達した。そして同時に、監視塔から警報が鳴り響いた。
右側の分岐では、赤い閃光が重力異常の兆候を告げていた。一方、左側の分岐からは、ネクロンの小兵が大量に襲いかかってきた！
